dashboard.rejectedMembershipTitle: Your application to {entityName} was not accepted
dashboard.pendingMembershipTitle: Your application to {entityName} is under review
dashboard.rejectedMembershipDefaultSubtitle: You can contact the administration or submit a new application
dashboard.underReviewSubtitle: The administration has started reviewing your application
dashboard.pendingMembershipSubtitle: You will be notified when a decision is made
dashboard.requiredActionsNone: No action is required from you right now.
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Start by creating an entity or joining one you've been invited to
dashboard.createEntityDesc: Family fund, friend group, cooperative — you define the type and rules
dashboard.haveInviteLinkDesc: Paste the link someone sent you and join directly
dashboard.actionItemsEmpty: Nothing pending — you are up to date in all your wallets ✓
dashboard.actionItemsHint: Each item explains why it appears, what happens if it is ignored, and the next step.
dashboard.membershipRejectedReason: The join request did not become an active membership.
dashboard.membershipUnderReviewReason: The entity administration has started reviewing your request.
dashboard.membershipPendingReason: Your request is recorded and still waiting for a decision.
dashboard.membershipRejectedImpact: No operational rights or obligations appear for this entity until a new request is accepted.
dashboard.membershipPendingImpact: Voting and benefit rights do not start until the membership is activated.
dashboard.membershipRejectedNext: Review the rejection reason or contact administration before applying again.
dashboard.membershipPendingNext: Wait for the administration decision or open the request details.
dashboard.overdueReason: You have an overdue due linked to the {pathName} path.
dashboard.overdueImpact: Late payment may affect benefit or voting rights depending on the path policy.
dashboard.overdueNext: Open subscriptions and pay or submit proof of payment.
dashboard.pendingDueReason: This amount is due under your subscription in the {pathName} path.
dashboard.pendingDueImpact: Paying on time keeps your subscription state and wallet balance clear.
dashboard.pendingDueNext: Open subscriptions and pay before the due date.
dashboard.proofPendingReason: You submitted payment proof and the treasurer has not confirmed it yet.
dashboard.proofPendingImpact: The due stays unsettled until the proof is reviewed.
dashboard.proofPendingNext: Track the proof status or open payment details if needed.
dashboard.generalError: An error occurred, please try again later
